headline: ConocoPhillips Joins US Firms Vowing $60 Billion for Iraqi Deals

headline: 3 Stocks Under $50 with Open Questions
summary: The $10-50 price range often includes mid-sized businesses with proven track records and plenty of growth runway ahead. They also usually carry less risk than penny stocks, though they’re not immune to volatility as many lack the scale advantages of their larger peers.

headline: Halliburton wins multi-year LSTK onshore contracts from Aramco
summary: Halliburton will deliver an integrated well model covering drilling, completions, workovers and oil re-entry operations.
